variants: Kamal Vohra is recognized for his contributions in Dentistry. His professional growth was fostered through the mentorship of Rafaela Santoro, who guided him during his academic career. Significant backing for his research comes from the Dreamspire Granting Circle, which has supported many of his initiatives. In the field, he holds the professional license of Solar Nomad Practitioner, showcasing his qualifications. His research has also been published in the Luminous Brook Journal, where he shares his findings with the wider community.
